name: port_check
description: Test TCP port reachability on a remote host
command: timeout 10 bash -c 'echo > /dev/tcp/{{host}}/{{port}}' 2>/dev/null && echo 'OPEN: {{host}}:{{port}} is reachable' || echo 'CLOSED: {{host}}:{{port}} is not reachable'

host.description: Hostname or IP address to check
